info.title: E-Commerce Order Management API
info.description: RESTful API for managing users and orders in an e-commerce system

id.description: Unique identifier of the user (UUID v4)

email.description: User email address used for login and communication

phone.description: User phone number in international format (10–15 digits, optional + prefix)

role.description: Role assigned to the user that determines access permissions

isActive.description: Indicates whether the user account is currently active

createdAt.description: Date and time when the user account was created (ISO 8601 format)

updatedAt.description: Date and time when the user account was last updated (ISO 8601 format)

password.description: User password (min 8 chars, at least 1 number)

role.description: User role (admin, user, manager). Only assignable by admin
User role (admin, user, manager). Only assignable by admin

id.description: Unique identifier of the product (UUID v4)

skuNumber.description: SKU number (Stock Keeping Unit) for inventory management

createdAt.description: Date and time when the product was created

updatedAt.description: Date and time when the product was last updated

id.description: Unique identifier of the order (UUID v4)

userId.description: Identifier of the user who placed the order

tax.description: Tax amount applied to the order

notes.example: Leave package at the front door

trackingNumber.description: Tracking number for the order shipment

estimatedDelivery.description: Estimated delivery date of the order

createdAt.description: Date and time when the order was created

updatedAt.description: Date and time when the order was last updated

products.description: Products included in the order with quantity and price details

productId.description: Identifier of the product included in the order

orderId.description: Identifier of the order containing the product

quantity.description: Quantity of the product in the order

price.description: Price of a single unit of the product in the order

createdAt.description: Date and time when the relation was created

updatedAt.description: Date and time when the relation was last updated

product.description: The product included in the order

order.description: The order that includes the product

productId.description: ID of the product being added to the order

quantity.description: Quantity of the product in the order

price.description: Price of the product at the time of order

notes.example: Leave package at the front door

estimatedDelivery.description: Estimated delivery date of the order

tax.description: Tax amount applied to the order

trackingNumber.description: Tracking number for the order shipment

notes.example: Leave package at the back door
